description: Exclamation-heavy, all-caps casual text with 'omg', 'lol', 'yesss', 'eeee' and other emoji-adjacent excitement markers. Team happy hour Friday at 5 PM at Rosie's Bar.

events.title: Team Happy Hour
events.reasoning: Through the exclamation-heavy casual language, Alice and Bob confirm a team happy hour on Friday at 5 PM at Rosie's Bar, expected to run until around 7 PM.
events.assumptions: End time is 7 PM based on Bob's 'probably till like 7 or so'. Friday = 2026-02-27 (next Friday from reference date).

mock_llm_response.summary: Found 1 event: team happy hour Friday at 5 PM at Rosie's Bar, running until approximately 7 PM.

notes: Reference datetime is Friday 2026-02-20. 'Friday' = next Friday = 2026-02-27. Challenge: filtering out enthusiasm markers ('!!', 'omg', 'lol', 'yesss', 'eeee') to find real scheduling content.
